infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Zolt needs your location to find deals nearby when Zolt Mode is active.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Zolt needs your location to find deals nearby.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Zolt needs background location access to alert you to deals nearby while Zolt Mode is on.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Zolt uses the camera to scan QR codes when redeeming deals.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Zolt needs your location to find deals nearby when Zolt Mode is active.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Zolt needs background location to alert you to deals.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Zolt needs your location to find deals nearby.

plugins.cameraPermission: Zolt uses the camera to scan QR codes.
